title: Mestre!
subtitle: Mac Screencast & Walkthroughs
description:
Record your Mac screen with camera, microphone, and on-device captions. Mestre is a native, focused Mac recorder. No heavy editing suite, no account required.

It is designed for tutorials, code walkthroughs, product demos, lessons, and updates where viewers benefit from seeing your screen, with optional cursor and camera when you want them in the recording.
nameOrigin: The name Mestre, meaning "teacher" or "master" in Valencian/Catalan, reflects the app's goal to support people who share knowledge, whether on social media, in a classroom, in an online course, or during a code walkthrough.
imageDescription: Mestre app icon, a stylised icon representing screen recording and teaching

featureGroups.title: Record what viewers need to see

features.title: Screen and window capture
features.description: Capture your full screen or selected windows. A guided status pill walks you through sharing your screen and getting ready to record.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre showing the screen and window capture picker and the status pill guiding the user through setup

features.title: Camera and microphone
features.description: Add your webcam and microphone when a personal walkthrough helps viewers follow along. Choose your camera and mic in Settings, or leave them off for screen-only recordings.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre with optional camera and microphone enabled alongside the screen preview

features.title: Presenter-friendly recording
features.description: When your camera is on, Mestre works naturally with macOS Presenter Overlay, a system feature that shows you on top of the screen you are sharing, along with system video effects. Mestre captures the recording; macOS handles the styling.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre prompting the user to enable macOS Presenter Overlay for a presenter-style recording

featureGroups.title: Captions on your Mac, not in the cloud

features.title: On-device subtitle generation
features.description: Generate subtitles from your microphone audio using Apple's on-device speech engine on your Mac. Your audio stays on your device; Mestre does not send it to a server for transcription.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre showing on-device subtitle generation in progress after a recording

features.title: Embedded MOV captions
features.description: Save captions inside your exported .mov file as a closed-caption track. One file, ready to share, with subtitles built in.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre exporting a recording with embedded MOV captions

features.title: Separate subtitle file
features.description: Prefer a separate subtitle file? Export an SRT file alongside your video for compatibility with editors, courses, and publishing workflows that expect subtitles separately.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre offering an SRT sidecar export option for subtitle compatibility

featureGroups.title: Stay in control without a heavy editor

features.title: Cursor and visibility
features.description: Show or hide the cursor in your recording, depending on what helps viewers follow along. You can also hide Mestre from the recording itself.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre Settings showing cursor visibility and hide-app-from-recording options

features.title: Keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Share Screen, start and stop recording, toggle camera and microphone, and open Settings from the keyboard. Help → Keyboard Shortcuts lists every shortcut in one place.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre's Keyboard Shortcuts help window listing recording shortcuts

features.title: Simple settings
features.description: Choose your devices, caption language, watermark behaviour, and permissions in a focused Settings pane. No timeline, no templates, no cluttered editor.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre Settings showing device pickers, caption options, and watermark controls

featureGroups.title: Free to use, fair to support

features.title: Record free with a small watermark
features.description: Core recording is always free. Exported videos include a small "Recorded with Mestre!" badge so viewers know what you used to make them.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of a Mestre export showing the default Recorded with Mestre watermark badge

features.title: Mestre Premium
features.description: Unlock clean exports or choose between Off, Mestre, and Custom watermark modes with Monthly, Yearly, or Lifetime access. Premium is optional; recording itself is never paywalled. Subscriptions support Family Sharing, and 10% of subscription proceeds go to AMMEC, an accessibility charity. Pricing is shown in the App Store at purchase.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre Premium options for watermark modes and clean exports

features.title: Custom watermark styling
features.description: Preview how the watermark will look in Settings before you export. Premium unlocks full control over text, size, colour, and placement.
features.imageDescription: Screenshot of Mestre Settings showing a watermark preview and custom styling controls

whySection: Mestre is built to be helpful, respectful, and easy to trust. Recording and transcription stay on your Mac. There is no account to create, no server required for capture or subtitles, and no ads or trackers. The app is focused on one job: helping you record presenter-style Mac videos without pulling you into a heavy editing suite. You can use it free with a small watermark, or unlock clean and custom exports with Premium when you are ready. 10% of Premium subscription proceeds go to AMMEC, which promotes autonomy and community integration for people with physical disabilities, supporting families and fostering inclusive environments.
supportText: Trying Mestre on TestFlight? We would love your feedback on recording, captions, watermark exports, and anything that feels unclear. Get in touch and we will help you get the most out of your screencasts.
